channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 62/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 62/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 29.5%.

item.title: Bluesky · @samfr.bsky.social: Why I think Burnham will win in Makerfield.
item.description: Why I think Burnham will win in Makerfield.

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Starmer under fire after UK quietly eases strict sanctions on Russian oil
item.description: Starmer under fire after UK quietly eases strict sanctions on Russian oil

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Minister defends relaxing some Russian oil sanctions with Starmer set to face PMQs grilling – UK politics live
item.description: Minister defends relaxing some Russian oil sanctions with Starmer set to face PMQs grilling – UK politics live

item.title: Independent UK Politics: I worked for Andy Burnham – here’s why he would be a brilliant prime minister
item.description: I worked for Andy Burnham – here’s why he would be a brilliant prime minister

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Rachel Reeves to protect ‘critical’ clean energy projects from legal challenges
item.description: Rachel Reeves to protect ‘critical’ clean energy projects from legal challenges

item.title: Independent UK Politics: British PM Starmer congratulates Arsenal as title celebrations go deep into the night
item.description: British PM Starmer congratulates Arsenal as title celebrations go deep into the night

item.title: BBC Politics: Supermarkets hit back over pressure to cap price of milk, bread and eggs

item.title:
Bluesky · @samfr.bsky.social: New post:
Is Andy Burnham overrated?
Why are the Tories so relaxed about their dire election results?
Do the BBC give Farage an easy ride?
Answering lots of your questions.
(£/free trial)
samf.substack.com/p/is-...
